description:
## Problem

`ameba src/proxy_controller.cr` reports 1 finding (Lint/UselessAssign — a real code fix, not auto-fixable).

## Fix

For Correctable items (`[C]`): run `nix develop . --command ameba --fix src/proxy_controller.cr`. For Warnings (`[W]`): review each finding manually and apply the appropriate change.

## Acceptance

- `nix develop . --command ameba src/proxy_controller.cr` returns 0 findings.
- `crystal tool format --check` exits clean.
- `just nix-build` passes; existing Crystal specs pass.

## Out of scope

- Findings in other files (tracked under the parent epic `quickhea-wv4`).
title: UselessAssign in src/controllers/proxy_controller.cr
